Auth.loginDescription: Enter your email and password to sign in.
Auth.registerDescription: Fill in the details below to get started.
Auth.name: Full name
Auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
Auth.forgotDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
Auth.forgotSentDescription: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent. The link expires in 1 hour.
Auth.resetDescription: Choose a strong new password for your account.
Auth.resetMissingToken: This reset link is invalid or incomplete. Request a new one.
Auth.resetDoneDescription: Your password has been reset. Redirecting to sign in…

Dashboard.title: Subscriptions
Dashboard.noSubscriptionsDesc: Add your first subscription to get started.
Dashboard.noResults: No subscriptions match the selected filters.

Subscription.newDescription: Fill in the details to track a new subscription.
Subscription.name: Name
Subscription.deleteDesc: This will permanently delete {name}. This action cannot be undone.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.preferencesDescription: Choose your language and default currency for reports.
Settings.notificationsDescription: Get email reminders about upcoming subscription payments.
Settings.remindOnDueDate: Remind me on the due date
Settings.remindersDeliveryNote: Reminders arrive in the morning (9–12) in your timezone.

Team.title: Team
Team.description: Share subscriptions with others. Everyone on a team sees the same data.
Team.currentTeamDesc: Your current team. Subscriptions, categories and payment methods belong to it.
Team.inviteDesc: Invite by email. Existing users are added right away; new emails receive an invitation link.
Team.leaveConfirm: Leave this team? You'll lose access to its subscriptions.
Team.deleteConfirm: Delete this team and all its subscriptions? This cannot be undone.

Invite.invalidDesc: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.
Invite.joinDesc: You were invited as {email}. Sign in or create an account to join.

Reports.title: Reports
Reports.noUpcoming: No upcoming renewals in the next 30 days

Category.title: Categories
Category.description: Categories help you group and filter your subscriptions.
Category.name: Name
Category.deleteDesc: This will remove "{name}" from all subscriptions.
Category.noCategoriesDesc: Create a category to start grouping your subscriptions.

Landing.heroSubtitle: Track every subscription in one place. Know exactly what you're spending, when renewals hit, and what to cancel.
Landing.feature1Desc: Add any subscription — streaming, SaaS, memberships. Never lose track of what you're paying for.
Landing.feature2Desc: See your monthly spend at a glance. Group by category and spot what's worth keeping.
Landing.feature3Desc: Know what's renewing in the next 30 days. No more surprise charges.
Landing.feature4Desc: Invite colleagues or family to a shared team. Everyone sees the same subscriptions and gets their own reminders.
Landing.heroNote: Free to start · No credit card required
Landing.trustLine: Available on web, iOS, and Android
Landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to stay in control
Landing.featuresSubtitle: From your first subscription to the whole household budget — Subscree keeps it organized.
Landing.feature5Desc: Mix currencies freely. Subscree converts everything into your preferred one for a true total.
Landing.feature6Desc: Your data is yours. Self-hostable, no ads, and we never sell your information.
Landing.showcase1Desc: A clean dashboard with your monthly total, upcoming charges, and every active subscription in one view.
Landing.showcase2Desc: Break spending down by category and billing cycle, and spot the subscriptions worth cancelling.
Landing.howSubtitle: Three steps to never miss a renewal again.
Landing.step1Desc: Enter what you pay for and set the amount, currency, and billing cycle.
Landing.step2Desc: Subscree totals everything in your currency and groups it by category.
Landing.step3Desc: Reminders before and on the day a payment is due — every morning, in your timezone.
Landing.mobileDesc: Native apps for iOS and Android with push reminders, so a renewal never catches you off guard.
Landing.finalTitle: Take control of your subscriptions today
Landing.finalSubtitle: Free to start. Add your first subscription in under a minute.
Landing.footerTagline: Track and manage all your subscriptions in one place.
Landing.showcase3Title: Share with your household or team
Landing.showcase3Desc: Invite family or colleagues to a shared team. Everyone sees the same subscriptions, and each member gets their own reminders in their own timezone.
Landing.seoTitle: Subscree — Track all your subscriptions in one place
Landing.seoDescription: Subscree helps you track every subscription, see your real monthly spend, and get reminded before each renewal. Free to start — on web, iOS, and Android.

PaymentMethod.title: Payment Methods
PaymentMethod.description: Manage the payment methods used for your subscriptions.
PaymentMethod.name: Name
PaymentMethod.deleteDesc: This will remove "{name}". Subscriptions using it will not be deleted.
PaymentMethod.noMethodsDesc: Add a card, bank, or wallet to track how you pay.

Errors.VALIDATION_NAME_MAX: Name must be less than 100 characters
Errors.VALIDATION_PASSWORD_MIN: Password must be at least 8 characters
Errors.VALIDATION_NEWPASSWORD_MIN: New password must be at least 8 characters
Errors.VALIDATION_URL_FORMAT: URL must be a valid URL
Errors.VALIDATION_LOGOURL_FORMAT: Logo URL must be a valid URL
Errors.VALIDATION_STARTDATE_TYPE: Start date must be a valid date
Errors.VALIDATION_NEXTBILLINGDATE_TYPE: Next billing date must be a valid date
Errors.VALIDATION_CANCELLEDAT_TYPE: Cancelled date must be a valid date
Errors.VALIDATION_NOTES_MAX: Notes must be less than 500 characters
Errors.VALIDATION_NOTIFYDAYSBEFORE_MIN: Reminder days must be at least 1
Errors.VALIDATION_NOTIFYDAYSBEFORE_MAX: Reminder days must be at most 60
Errors.VALIDATION_NOTIFYDAYSBEFORE_TYPE: Reminder days must be a number
Errors.AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID: Your session is invalid or has expired. Please sign in again.
Errors.INVITATION_EMAIL_MISMATCH: This invitation was sent to a different email address
Errors.TEAM_NOT_MEMBER: You are not a member of this team
Errors.TEAM_OWNER_ONLY_RENAME: Only the owner can rename the team
Errors.TEAM_OWNER_ONLY_DELETE: Only the owner can delete the team
Errors.TEAM_OWNER_ONLY_REMOVE: Only the owner can remove members
Errors.TEAM_OWNER_ONLY_INVITE: Only the owner can invite members
Errors.TEAM_OWNER_ONLY_REVOKE: Only the owner can revoke invitations
Errors.TEAM_LAST_OWNER_LEAVE: The last owner cannot leave. Delete the team or assign another owner first.
Errors.TEAM_ALREADY_MEMBER: This user is already a member
Errors.TEAM_NONE_ACTIVE: No active team. Create or join a team first.
Errors.CATEGORY_NAME_EXISTS: A category with this name already exists
Errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
